title: Claude vs GPT-4o vs Gemini: The Benchmark Nobody's Showing

scene_descriptions.description: Three orbs — Cyan, green, purple pulsing in void
scene_descriptions.notes: Dark screen. Three glowing orbs appear. Low electronic hum. 'Last week, we told you something was changing.'

scene_descriptions.description: Three workspaces — Side-by-side model interfaces with same prompt
scene_descriptions.notes: Orbs explode into three workspaces. Cyan/green/purple color signatures. Sharp electronic pulse SFX.

scene_descriptions.description: Benchmark montage — Thumbnails, tweets, corporate charts
scene_descriptions.notes: 'Most benchmarks are rigged.' Quick montage of exaggerated AI content, corporate charts with fine print. Tension note.

scene_descriptions.description: Test declaration — Clean transition to 'we ran the test ourselves'
scene_descriptions.text_overlay: So we ran the test ourselves.
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: The Test ends. Deep bass hit SFX. Clean, confident moment.

scene_descriptions.description: Model cards — Split screen with name, version, price, context window
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: The Models (1:30). Clean Bloomberg-meets-Apple design. Three panels with key model details.

scene_descriptions.description: Price comparison — Animated bars leveling at $20/mo
scene_descriptions.notes: Animated bars level out. 'The difference is what happens after you press enter.'

scene_descriptions.description: Task grid — 12 tiles illuminating by category
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: The Twelve Tasks (2:45). Clean grid of 12 tiles. 'Not SAT questions. Not coding puzzles.'

scene_descriptions.description: Category reveals — Four groups of tiles illuminate sequentially
scene_descriptions.notes: Cyan for Writing, Amber for Analysis, Green for Strategy, Purple for Problem-Solving. Sequential illumination.
Chapter: The Results (4:00). Grid transforms to scoreboard. Writing scores animate — Claude brightest.
Analysis scores animate in. Gemini glows strongest. 'It caught details the other two missed entirely.'

scene_descriptions.text_overlay: Writing: Claude | Analysis: Gemini | Strategy: Tied | Problem-Solving: Claude
scene_descriptions.notes: Strategy nearly tied (GPT-4o slight edge). Problem-solving: Claude wins clearly. Summary text overlay.

scene_descriptions.description: Tool shapes — Orbs morph into pen, magnifying glass, blueprint
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: What This Actually Means (6:00). Scoreboard dissolves. Warm strings from EP001 return.

scene_descriptions.description: Multi-tool merge — Three tools become one multi-faceted object
scene_descriptions.text_overlay: The right tool for the right task.
scene_descriptions.notes: 'They're using all three. For different things.' Three colors merge.

scene_descriptions.description: Workflow visualization — Tasks routed to models, human directing
scene_descriptions.notes: Tasks flow left to right, routed to optimal model. Human figure directs. Confirmation tone SFX.

scene_descriptions.description: Figure at desk — Light-figure using AI tools, EP001 crossroads callback
scene_descriptions.notes: Chapter: The Real Benchmark (7:30). Piano enters. EP001 callback — Mara, the shift, the bright path.

scene_descriptions.description: Final logo — Figure dissolves into V-Real AI logo with tagline
scene_descriptions.notes: EP003 tease: '$50-a-month setup replacing $5,000 teams.' Then: 'You're not paranoid. You're observant.' Logo resolve.
